title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS backed by $85M+ in funding, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its go-to-market engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Includes collaboration with the Tel Aviv HQ across time zones.
score_reason: Exceptional match on all dimensions: Head of Revenue Operations role aligns perfectly with target positions, 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, Salesforce expertise confirmed, B2B SaaS and fintech background directly relevant, and Tel Aviv/Global location structure matches geographic preferences.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations opening and thought of you immediately—scaling GTM operations in fintech SaaS at this funding stage is exactly where your 15+ years of RevOps leadership shines. Having built revenue operations infrastructure through multiple growth phases in B2B SaaS, you understand the playbook Finout needs: Salesforce-driven forecasting, cross-functional alignment at scale, and the operational rigor required to support a $85M+ backed growth trajectory. The Tel Aviv/NY dual hub setup also aligns with your location flexibility.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a RevOps Manager to redesign territory models and processes for global scalability. Responsibilities include partnering with Sales leadership, Strategy and Finance to optimize territory compositions, analyzing historical performance and account data, and maintaining territory mapping in CRM systems. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills (Excel, SQL, BI tools like Tableau/Retool), and Salesforce proficiency. Salary range $149K–$175K USD.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Gong is a flagship B2B SaaS RevOps use case, the role directly aligns with Omri's core expertise in territory strategy, pipeline forecasting, and Salesforce-driven GTM optimization. Remote US role fits location flexibility perfectly.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building RevOps infrastructure for scaling B2B SaaS teams, and Gong's approach to revenue intelligence resonates deeply with how I think about territory modeling and pipeline orchestration. I noticed you're looking for someone to redesign territory compositions for global scale, and I've led exactly this work across multiple hypergrowth phases, combining Salesforce architecture with data-driven forecasting to compress sales cycles and improve quota attainment.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Instrumentl, a YC-backed grant management SaaS with 5,000+ nonprofit clients, seeks a RevOps Manager to own the technical infrastructure powering its revenue engine. This builder role involves architecting the CRM data model, integrating data sources, and leading AI tool implementation across sales processes. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue/Sales/Marketing Operations at a B2B SaaS company, strong technical skills (SQL, APIs, complex workflows), and hands-on CRM administration (HubSpot preferred).
score_reason: Strong alignment with RevOps Manager role, HubSpot expertise, B2B SaaS background, and AI tool implementation experience. Slight gap: 15+ years exceeds 3-5 requirement (potential overqualification concern), but nonprofit/grant tech differs from fintech/AI-native GTM focus.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across your RevOps background and thought you'd find Instrumentl interesting—we're a YC-backed grant management platform helping 5,000+ nonprofits, and we're looking for a RevOps builder to architect our CRM data model and lead AI tool implementation across sales. Given your expertise in pipeline forecasting and complex GTM infrastructure, I think you'd thrive owning the technical engine that powers revenue here.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: VulnCheck seeks a Revenue Operations Manager to design and optimize scalable revenue processes across the full customer lifecycle. Requires 4+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or GTM Systems within B2B SaaS, hands-on Salesforce or HubSpot administration, experience building executive dashboards covering pipeline health, conversion, forecasting and churn/expansion, and strong knowledge of SaaS metrics (ARR, ACV, sales velocity, NRR). Experience integrating a broader GTM tech stack is a plus.
score_reason: Excellent match: 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps experience far exceeds 4+ year requirement, deep Salesforce/HubSpot expertise, proven pipeline forecasting and SaaS metrics mastery (ARR, ACV, NRR). Remote US role aligns perfectly with location preferences.
ai_opener: I noticed VulnCheck is building out Revenue Operations to scale your GTM machine—that's exactly the kind of work I've spent 15 years perfecting across multiple hypergrowth SaaS environments. I'd love to explore how I can help VulnCheck accelerate revenue predictability and operational maturity.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo, an AI research platform used by brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange, seeks a GTM Engineer to replace manual workflows and tribal knowledge with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows.
